summary: Backend API testing for profile/common friends API parameter fix - 12 PASSED, 1 SKIPPED
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix confirmed: getCommonFriends API now uses 'other_user_id' parameter to match backend expectation
Backend (routes/profiles.py line 95) correctly expects: other_user_id: str parameter
Error handling improved in user/business/artist profile screens - failures now caught and logged without crashing
All profile endpoints (user/business/artist) return correct 404 for invalid IDs

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed, 1 skipped due to no businesses in DB)
success_rate.frontend: Not directly testable (Expo React Native mobile app)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The parameter mismatch bug is fixed. The /api/friends/common endpoint now correctly works with other_user_id parameter. Previous logs showed 422 errors with user_id parameter, now showing 200 OK with other_user_id parameter.

common_friends_api_fix.previous_bug: Frontend was sending user_id, backend expected other_user_id, causing 422 validation errors

business_detail.note: Test skipped because no businesses in database

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Parameter name mismatch between frontend and backend for common friends API
rca_of_the_issue.result: 422 Unprocessable Entity validation error preventing profiles from loading
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed frontend getCommonFriends() to use other_user_id parameter
